generator: LocalShowdownEnv + RolloutDriver, RandomLegalPolicy vs RandomLegalPolicy, gen3randombattle, max_decision_rounds=250, POKEZERO_BELIEF_SET_SOURCE=1
determinism: battle seed + per-player RNG only; |t:| timestamp lines stripped for byte stability

key_events.turn_7: Weezing Explosion -> double faint (double cold replacement phase)
key_events.turn_15: Pidgeot eats Liechi Berry (|-enditem| [eat]) then faints

purpose: Reusable rich-history fixture: early Explosion double-faint + hazards + status + item reveal inside turn 16; chosen for the v2.1 token-format documentation and turn-merged-token tests.
